snippet.title: Yabesh Thapa - Herai Basai | Extended Version | OFFICIAL VISUALIZER
snippet.description:
Hi lovelies, since so many of you said Herai Basai felt too short, we wanted to give it a little more life by making an extended version. We asked you all to send in videos with the people, places, pets, or anything you love, and we were truly overwhelmed by the incredible flood of love and support that came in. Watching all your beautiful videos made us smile so much, and it meant the world to see how deeply this song connected with you. WeтАЩre so sorry we couldnтАЩt fit every single submission, but please know weтАЩre endlessly grateful to everyone who took the time to share something so special with us. We hope this video makes you smile and fills you with warmth, because I was smiling ear to ear when I watched it for the first time too ;)

Written, Composed, Performed by Yabesh Thapa
Produced by SNJV and Yabesh Thapa

Visuals by Noisy

Stream the album 'GhaamChhaya'

snippet.title: Tera Chehra 8K/4K Music Video | Arijit Singh | Harshvardhan | Himesh Reshammiya | Sanam Teri Kasam
snippet.description:
Experience the timeless romance of Tera Chehra from the film Sanam Teri Kasam in stunning 8K/4K quality. Featuring Harshvardhan Rane and Mawra Hocane this soulful track is sung by Arijit Singh with composed by Himesh Reshammiya.

#terachehra #8k #arijitsingh #8kvideo  #sanamterikasam #harshvardhanrane #himeshreshammiya

Credits:
Song - Tera Chehra
Singer - Arijit Singh
Composer - Himesh Reshammiya
Lyricist - Himesh Reshammiya, Shabbir Ahmedd

Lyrics:
Meri bechainiyon ko chain mill jaaye
Tera chehra jab nazar aaye
Tera chehra jab nazar aaye

Mere deewanepan ko sabr mil jaaye
Tera chehra jab nazar aaye
Tera chehra jab nazar aaye

Zikr tumhara jab jab hota hai
Dekho na aankhon se
bheega bheega pyaar beh jaata hai

Meri tanhaiyon ko noor mill jaaye
Tera chehra jab nazar aaye
Tera chehra jab nazar aaye

Main raat-din ye duaa karun
Tere liye main jiyun marun
Chaaron pehar tujhe dekha karun
Mera jahan ye tujhpe fanaa karun

Zikr tumhara jab jab hota hai
Dekho na honthon pe tera ehsaas
Reh jaata hai

Mere har raaste ko manzil mill jaaye
Tera chehra jab nazar aaye
Tera chehra jab nazar aaye

Berang hawayein mujhe naa jaane
De gayi sadaa kyun abhi abhi
Hai sarfaroshi ye aashiqui bhi
Jaayegi jaan meri isme kabhi

Zikr tumhara jab jab hota hai
Dekho na har lamha teri daastaan
keh jaata hai

Meri har ik tadap ko sukoon mill jaaye
Tera chehra jab nazar aaye
Tera chehra jab nazar aaye

Experience the timeless romance of Tera Chehra from the film Sanam Teri Kasam in stunning 8K/4K quality. Featuring Harshvardhan Rane and Mawra Hocane this soulful track is sung by Arijit Singh with composed by Himesh Reshammiya.

#terachehra #8k #arijitsingh #8kvideo  #sanamterikasam #harshvardhanrane #himeshreshammiya

Credits:
Song - Tera Chehra
Singer - Arijit Singh
Composer - Himesh Reshammiya
Lyricist - Himesh Reshammiya, Shabbir Ahmedd

Lyrics:
Meri bechainiyon ko chain mill jaaye
Tera chehra jab nazar aaye
Tera chehra jab nazar aaye

Mere deewanepan ko sabr mil jaaye
Tera chehra jab nazar aaye
Tera chehra jab nazar aaye

Zikr tumhara jab jab hota hai
Dekho na aankhon se
bheega bheega pyaar beh jaata hai

Meri tanhaiyon ko noor mill jaaye
Tera chehra jab nazar aaye
Tera chehra jab nazar aaye

Main raat-din ye duaa karun
Tere liye main jiyun marun
Chaaron pehar tujhe dekha karun
Mera jahan ye tujhpe fanaa karun

Zikr tumhara jab jab hota hai
Dekho na honthon pe tera ehsaas
Reh jaata hai

Mere har raaste ko manzil mill jaaye
Tera chehra jab nazar aaye
Tera chehra jab nazar aaye

Berang hawayein mujhe naa jaane
De gayi sadaa kyun abhi abhi
Hai sarfaroshi ye aashiqui bhi
Jaayegi jaan meri isme kabhi

Zikr tumhara jab jab hota hai
Dekho na har lamha teri daastaan
keh jaata hai

Meri har ik tadap ko sukoon mill jaaye
Tera chehra jab nazar aaye
Tera chehra jab nazar aaye

Audio on Sony Music Entertainment India Pvt. Ltd (C) 2026

snippet.title: PATI PATNI AUR WOH DO (Trailer): Ayushmann, Wamiqa, Sara, Rakul | Mudassar, Bhushan K, Juno | 15 May
snippet.description:
15th May se Prajapati Pandey macha rahe hain bawaalтАж Kaun Patni, Kaun Woh? Hal karenge saare sawaalтАж Parivaar sahit dekhein! 

Presenting the Official Trailer of "Pati Patni Aur Woh Do" starring Ayushmann Khurrana, Sara Ali Khan, Wamiqa Gabbi, Rakul Preet Singh, Vijay Raaz, Tigmanshu Dhulia, Vishal Vasistha, Guneet Singh, Durgesh Kumar, Ayesha Raza Mishra, Shireesh Kumar Sharma and Deepika Amin 

#PatiPatniAurWohDo in cinemas worldwide 15th May 2026!

Gulshan Kumar, B.R. Chopra & T-Series Present

тАЛA T-Series Films & B.R. Studios Production

"Pati Patni Aur Woh Do"

snippet.title: Shararat - 8K Video | Dhurandhar | Ranveer Singh, Shashwat S, Jasmine, Madhubanti, Ayesha, Krystle
snippet.description:
Shararat in stunning 8K brings playful vibes and infectious energy in ultra-high definition.

ЁЯСЙ Subscribe to Saregama Music: https://bit.ly/3FkAS0W

Credits:
A Shashwat Sachdev Musical

Song Name: Shararat
Music: Shashwat Sachdev
Singers: Madhubanti Bagchi, Jasmine Sandlas
Lyrics: Jasmine Sandlas, Shashwat Sachdev

Lyrics:
Tune parda uthaaya, haaye kya baat ho gayi 
Haaye 
Ye mulakaat, vaardaat ho gayi 
Nain milaaye humne ik dooje se yoon 
Raat hui 
Phir din 
Phir se raat ho gayi 
Kachhi kali sadda maasoom chehra 
Neeyat noorani Sadda dil hai sunehra 
Kachhi kali sadda maasoom chehra 
Neeyat noorani Sadda dil hai sunehra 
Parde de peeche ki hai Kisnoo pata 
Parde de peeche ki hai Kisnoo pata 
Ik afeemi main chaskha chakhaanwan 
Tennu shararat sikhaanwan 
Jaddon naina ladaawan 
Tennu shararat sikhaanwan 
Jaddon naina ladaawan 
Naina ch mere ik neela samandar 
Naina ch mere ik neela samandar 
Iss samandar mein dubki lawaanwan 
Tennu shararat sikhaanwan Jaddon naina ladaawan 
Tennu shararat sikhaanwan Jaddon naina ladaawan 
Aye Haye Tum bhi ho tanha 
Aur hum akele Jo saath huye laajawab ho gaye 
Tum bhi haseen aur hum aashqeen 
Jo raat huyi benaqaab ho gaye 
Mere labon pe saji surkhiyan 
Mere labon pe saji surkhiyan 
Gulabi ye sharbat pilaanwan 
Tennu shararat sikhaanwan Jaddon naina ladaawan 
Tennu shararat sikhaanwan Jaddon naina ladaawan 
Naina ch mere ik neela samandar 
Naina ch mere ik rangeela samandar 
Iss samandar mein dubki lawaanwan 
Tennu shararat sikhaanwan Jaddon naina ladaawan 
Tennu shararat sikhaanwan Jaddon naina ladaawan

#Shararat
#dhurandhar 
#ranveersingh 
#shashwatsachdev 
#madhubantibagchi 
#JasmineSandlas

snippet.title: The Odyssey | Official New Trailer
snippet.description:
The Odyssey - In Theaters 7 17 26

Christopher NolanтАЩs next film, The Odyssey, is a mythic action epic shot across the world using brand new IMAX┬о film technology. The film brings HomerтАЩs foundational saga to IMAX┬о film screens for the first time and opens in theaters everywhere on July 17, 2026. 

The Odyssey stars Matt Damon, Tom Holland, Anne Hathaway, Robert Pattinson and Lupita NyongтАЩo, with Zendaya and Charlize Theron.

The Odyssey is produced by Emma Thomas and Christopher Nolan for their company, Syncopy. The executive producer is Thomas Hayslip.

snippet.title: Aakhri Sawal Official Trailer | Sanjay Dutt | Namashi | Amit Sadh | Sameera Reddy | 15 May Release
snippet.description:
What happens when the truth refuses to stay buried?
Watch the trailer of #AakhriSawal тАФ where every answer comes at a cost.

What begins as an academic accusation soon explodes into a nationwide debate.
Aakhri Sawal follows Vicky, a brilliant yet volatile scholar, who publicly challenges his mentor тАФ the legendary Professor Gopal Nadkarni тАФ accusing him of institutional bias.
As media outrage, political agendas, and public opinion collide, the confrontation transforms into a dangerous psychological chess match.
From the Gandhi assassination to the Emergency, no truth is left untouched.
But beneath the arguments lies a far deeper mystery.
Why is Vicky really asking these questions?
As buried secrets begin to surface, one final question threatens to change everything.
The Question India Never Stopped Asking.
In Cinemas on 15th May

Cast
Sanjay Dutt as Professor Gopal Nadkarni
Namashi Chakraborty as Vicky Hegde
Amit Sadh as Aditya Rao
Sameera Reddy as Professor Pallavi Menon
Neetu Chandra as Kavya Rawat
Tridha Choudhary as Saara
Mrinal Kulkarni as Prabha Nadkarni
Harsimran Oberoi as Ipshita Das
Rockey Raina as Sohraab
Archana Iyer as VickyтАЩs Mother
Bipin Nadkarni as Bipin Chaudhary
Nikhil Nanda as M.S. Golwalkar

Crew
Directed by Abhijeet Mohan Warang
Nikhil Nanda Motion Pictures & Neem Tree Entertainment Presents
Produced by Nikhil Nanda & Sanjay Dutt
Co-Producers: Puneet Nanda, Dr. Deepak Singh, Gaurav Dubey, Ujjwal Anand
Written by Utkarsh Naithani
DOP: Stanley Mudda

Action Director: Amit Naikar
DA & Script Supervisor: Himanshu Raj KanthCrew

en.title: Aakhri Sawal Official Trailer | Sanjay Dutt | Namashi | Amit Sadh | Sameera Reddy | 15 May Release
en.description:
What happens when the truth refuses to stay buried?
Watch the trailer of #AakhriSawal тАФ where every answer comes at a cost.

What begins as an academic accusation soon explodes into a nationwide debate.
Aakhri Sawal follows Vicky, a brilliant yet volatile scholar, who publicly challenges his mentor тАФ the legendary Professor Gopal Nadkarni тАФ accusing him of institutional bias.
As media outrage, political agendas, and public opinion collide, the confrontation transforms into a dangerous psychological chess match.
From the Gandhi assassination to the Emergency, no truth is left untouched.
But beneath the arguments lies a far deeper mystery.
Why is Vicky really asking these questions?
As buried secrets begin to surface, one final question threatens to change everything.
The Question India Never Stopped Asking.
In Cinemas on 15th May

Cast
Sanjay Dutt as Professor Gopal Nadkarni
Namashi Chakraborty as Vicky Hegde
Amit Sadh as Aditya Rao
Sameera Reddy as Professor Pallavi Menon
Neetu Chandra as Kavya Rawat

snippet.title: Bandar Teaser + Kartavya Trailer REVIEW | Deeksha Sharma
snippet.description:
Bandar Teaser + Kartavya Trailer Review by Deeksha Sharma. Bandar Movie Featuring Bobby Deol & Sanya Malhotra Directed by Anurag Kashyap is based on real life Crime thriller which shook bollywood film industry whereas Kartavya Trailer Featuring Saif Ali Khan on Netflix is a Hunt Thriller for Truth which uncovers a dark story with New Villain Lallantop Saurabh Dwivedi. Bandar Teaser Review & Kartavya Trailer Netflix backed by Shahrukh Khan & Red Chillies Reaction would be shared in this Video. Bobby Deol 2.0 with Director Anurag Kashyap or Saif Ali Khan in Action Thriller- What are you most excited for? Do leave Comments below.

#Bandar #BandarTeaser #Kartavya

snippet.title: Sushant KC - Bela Bela (Official Music Video)
snippet.description:
тАШBela BelaтАЩ finally found its home on Sushant KCтАЩs channel.

And it carries a subtle reminder that love isnтАЩt perfect. Love isnтАЩt always easy, but maybe itтАЩs the little mistakes, the silences, the considerations, the compromises, and everything we learn along the way that make love feel real. Bela bela ma ta bhool bhaihalcha ni!

A relaxed, intimate one-take for a song many of you first discovered through the film тАШRammita Ko Pirati.тАЩ Because some music doesnтАЩt need too much.

I hope this stays with you for a while. тЭдя╕П

Written/Composed/Performed by: Sushant KC
Music Produced by: Eskecy and Saswot Shrestha
Mix/Master: Saswot Shrestha (Omniphonics studio)

Video Credits:  
Director: Rupesh Shrestha  
Artist: Sushant KC  
Project Manager: Pratik Rai  
DOP: Nayan Rai  
Production Manager: Shyam Khadka  
Production Assistant: Shankar Parajuli  
Production 2nd Assistant: Sabal
Editor: Ashok Adhikari
Color: Nayan Rai

snippet.title: Teri Ore (Lyrical Video) | Singh Is Kinng | Akshay Kumar, Katrina Kaif | Rahat, Shreya | Love Song
snippet.description:
Feel the magic of love with Teri Ore, a love song from Singh Is Kinng ЁЯТЦтЬи

Starring the evergreen Bollywood jodi Akshay Kumar and Katrina Kaif, known for their incredible on-screen chemistry, this romantic track beautifully captures the essence of love. Sung by Rahat Fateh Ali Khan and Shreya Ghoshal, with music by Pritam, Teri Ore remains one of the most loved Bollywood love songs.

This timeless Hindi romantic song is known for its soothing melody, heartfelt lyrics, and unforgettable visuals. Whether you're in love or simply enjoy classical Bollywood music, Teri Ore creates a deep emotional connection that stays with you. ЁЯТл

The iconic pairing of Akshay Kumar and Katrina Kaif shines throughout the song. To enjoy more of their magical chemistry, donтАЩt miss songs from Welcome, along with other hit tracks from Singh Is Kinng like Jee Karda, Talli Hua, and Bhootni Ke. ЁЯО╢

ЁЯТм Tell us in the comments тАФ is this your favorite romantic Bollywood song?

id.title: Teri Ore (Video Lirik) | Singh Adalah Raja | Akshay Kumar, Katrina Kaif | Rahat, Shreya | Lagu Cinta
id.description:
Rasakan keajaiban cinta dengan Teri Ore, lagu cinta dari film Singh Is Kinng ЁЯТЦтЬи

Dibintangi oleh pasangan Bollywood abadi Akshay Kumar dan Katrina Kaif, yang dikenal karena chemistry luar biasa mereka di layar, lagu romantis ini dengan indah menangkap esensi cinta. Dinyanyikan oleh Rahat Fateh Ali Khan dan Shreya Ghoshal, dengan musik oleh Pritam, Teri Ore tetap menjadi salah satu lagu cinta Bollywood yang paling dicintai.

Lagu romantis Hindi abadi ini dikenal karena melodi yang menenangkan, lirik yang menyentuh hati, dan visual yang tak terlupakan. Baik Anda sedang jatuh cinta atau sekadar menikmati musik Bollywood klasik, Teri Ore menciptakan koneksi emosional yang dalam yang akan selalu Anda ingat. ЁЯТл

Pasangan ikonik Akshay Kumar dan Katrina Kaif bersinar sepanjang lagu. Untuk menikmati lebih banyak chemistry magis mereka, jangan lewatkan lagu-lagu dari Welcome, bersama dengan lagu-lagu hits lainnya dari Singh Is Kinng seperti Jee Karda, Talli Hua, dan Bhootni Ke. ЁЯО╢

en.title: Teri Ore (Lyrical Video) | Singh Is Kinng | Akshay Kumar, Katrina Kaif | Rahat, Shreya | Love Song
en.description:
Feel the magic of love with Teri Ore, a love song from Singh Is Kinng ЁЯТЦтЬи

Starring the evergreen Bollywood jodi Akshay Kumar and Katrina Kaif, known for their incredible on-screen chemistry, this romantic track beautifully captures the essence of love. Sung by Rahat Fateh Ali Khan and Shreya Ghoshal, with music by Pritam, Teri Ore remains one of the most loved Bollywood love songs.

This timeless Hindi romantic song is known for its soothing melody, heartfelt lyrics, and unforgettable visuals. Whether you're in love or simply enjoy classical Bollywood music, Teri Ore creates a deep emotional connection that stays with you. ЁЯТл

The iconic pairing of Akshay Kumar and Katrina Kaif shines throughout the song. To enjoy more of their magical chemistry, donтАЩt miss songs from Welcome, along with other hit tracks from Singh Is Kinng like Jee Karda, Talli Hua, and Bhootni Ke. ЁЯО╢

snippet.title: Bangles (Official┬а#Video) Sanju Rathod Ft. Isha Malviya | G-Spark | #Marathi Pop 2026 | рдмрд╛рдВрдЧрдбреА
snippet.description:
|| ЁЯХЙ ||
Sanju Rathod presents the official music video of Bangles. After the success of Shaky, he reunites with Isha Malviya for a track that blends Maharashtrian roots with reggae and pop. Set in Cool Wadi, the video follows a spirited, fashion-forward Isha as Sanju introduces her to traditional adornments like bangles, symbolizing a deeper cultural connection.

Singer - Sanju Rathod
Lyrics\Composer - Sanju Rathod
Music Produced By - G-Spark

snippet.title: Oshin Karki - Ghar feat. SAGEnomore (Prod. by pozod)
snippet.description:
тАЬGharтАЭ is a song about missing someone so deeply that even distance, time and change cannot take them away from you. Some people may leave, but they still feel like home. It captures the quiet ache of two souls who found each other in a time that couldnтАЩt hold them, yet left an imprint too deep to fade. тАЬGharтАЭ is a promise that even in distance, in silence, in separate lives, a part of us continues to belong to the one who once felt like home. ItтАЩs about carrying someone within you not as a wound but as a warmth. A memory. A home you can never return to, yet never truly leave.

Written composed and performed by Oshin Karki and SAGEnomore
Prod. by pozod
Cameo: Aash and Celine Prajapati
Shot by Sayun Shakya and storenutter
Production Manager: Celine Prajapati
Directed by storenutter

┬й 2026 ClassX Presentation

snippet.title: Bakhuda Tumhi Ho | Atif Aslam | Alka Yagnik | Kismat Konnection | Shahid Kapoor, Vidya Balan
snippet.description:
Song Credits:
Song: Bakhuda Tumhi Ho
Movie: Kismat Konnection
Singer(s): Atif Aslam, Alka Yagnik
Music Director: Pritam
Lyricist: Sayeed Quadri

Movie Cast & Crew:
Producer: Ramesh S. Taurani
Director: Aziz Mirza
Cast: Shahid Kapoor, Vidya Balan, Juhi Chawla, Vishal Malhotra, Om Puri, Boman Irani

Song Lyrics:

O Oo O Hoo
Hoooo
Aaaaaa
Tumhi Ehaashon Mein 
Tumhi Jazbaaton Mein 
Tumhi Lamhaton Mein 
Tumhi Din Raaton Mein

Bakhuda Tumhi Ho
Har Jagah Tumhi Ho
Haan Mein Dekhon Jahan Jab
Us Jagah Tumhi Ho
Yeh Jahaan Tumhi Ho
Woh Jahaan Tumhi Ho
Is Zameen Se Falak Ke Darmiyan Tumhi Ho
Tum Hi Ho Beshubaar 
Tum Hi Hoo
Tum Hi Ho Mujhe Mein Haan
Tum Hi Ho Tum Hi Ho
Oooooo Ooo Oooo O Oo O O O Oo

Kaise Batayein Tumhein Aur Kis Tarah Yeh 
Kitna Tumhein Hum Chahtein Hai 
Saya Bhi Tera Dikhe To Paas Jaake 
Usmein Simat Hum Jaate Hain
Rasta Tumhi Ho Rehnuma Tumhi Ho
Jiski Khwaaish Hai Humko
Woh Panah Tumhi Ho

Tum Hi Ho Besuba 
Tum Hi Ho
Tum Hi Ho Mujh Mein Haan
Tum Hi Ho

Tumhi Ehaashon Mein 
Tumhi Jazbaaton Mein 
Tumhi Lamhaton Mein 
Tumhi Din Raaton Mein

Kaise Batayein Tumhein
Shab Mein Tumhare
Khwaab Haseen Jo Aate Hain
Kaise Batayein Tumhein
Labzz Woh Saare
Jism Ko Jo Mehkate Hain
Iftida Tumhi Ho
Imtihan Tumhi Ho
Tum Ho Jeene Ka Maksad
Aur Wajah Tumhi Ho

Bakhuda Tumhi Ho
Har Jagah Tumhi Ho
Haan Mein Dekhon Mein Jahan Jab
Us Jagah Tumhi Ho
Yeh Jahaan Tumhi Ho
Woh Jahaan Tumhi Ho
Is Zamee Se Falak Ke Darmiyaan Tumhi Ho
Tum Hi Ho Beshubar 
Tum Hi Hoo
Tum Hi Ho Mujhe Mein Haan
Tum Hi Ho Tum Hi Ho
Oooooo Ooo Oooo O Oo O O O Oo

#AtifAslam #ShahidKapoor #VidyaBalan #BakhudaTumhiHo #KismatKonnection

snippet.title: Amrisu Music - SALI HOO (Official music video)(Prod by - @gorkhaymusic ||Tharu rap song ||Tharu song
snippet.description:
SONG WRITER, COMPOSER, VOCALIST :- Amrisu Music 
MIX MASTER BY:- Butwal sound Scape 
BEAT PRODUCER :- @gorkhaymusic
Amrisu Music: ┬а┬а┬а/┬аamrit.tharu.5055┬а┬атАЛ

 Big Thanks To
 
TIKRAM THARU 
SUJIT THARU 
ASHMA THARU
HEMANT THARU
ASHISH THARU

LYRICS:-

Tohar vhatu chaudgaran ghar k 
Tension na leo khan pan k 
Katil ba adaa tohar jyan na maro jaan jan k
Xoro tuh beggi pant suhaitho gahna sutiya me ho
Nano sali jaar k jhor mai baithal batu khatiya me 
Hah

Larhiya te nai ho sali mela chali tractor se
Heroni banbo sali bolo call milau director he 
Director xoro mayak direction dekhaim tohar didi ja fe kahhi tb fe maya mai lagaim 

Katho maya lagal vhatu lekin hertho kabo nai 
Furhun maya kartho ki tu muhin detho ho sajay 
Sajay deho lekin pyar se thorik
Sali vhatuk rista nata xoro banjao tuh morik

Sali aadhi ghar wali kathai pura mai banalu 
Bato lobh lagtik sughar sochthu maya fe lagalu
Mai te lagaibu ho sali maiya tohar ka bichar bawe
Atna sughar kaise kaucha sundarta k raaj bawe
 
Ghana daili sali barda oo vhaisa le 
Ha sali vhatuk maya keu fe kine na seki paisa le 
E maya lagaina karan te bahute dher bawe lekin 
Maya lagal sali tohar baisa le

Maya te lagal sali kahe janek paral 
Khali risaile se nai hoith milke rahe janek paral 
Janek te paral tharu jati kahna ka ho 
Apan purkhauli sanskar sange laike chalek paral 
Tharu madra k taal 
Maghi naya ho saal 
Morik aankhi ba laal 
Pi k andi k jaar 
Hathem surik sikar 
Sub or tharuk jaykar
Ulta sidha bole se tai pahile kailehas bichar

Dekho Korea Japan me fe tharu k bakhan 
Pure bishwo bhar me famous haman tharu pahichan 
Haman alag khan pan haman chutte bawe shan 
Tabbe kathai tharu cast nai ho hobe e brand


#SALIHOO#Tharu#amrisu
||Tharu song , Tharu rap song , new Tharu song ||

snippet.title: O Meri Laila | Laila Majnu | Patta Anaaron Ka Patta Chinaron Ka Jaise Hawaon Mein | Tu Meri Laila
snippet.description:
Movie - Laila Majnu
Cast - Avinash Tiwary & Tripti Dimri

Song -  O Meri Laila
Singers - Jyotica Tangri
Music - Joi Barua
Lyrics - Irshad Kamil

Lyrics:

Patta Anaaron Ka Patta Chinaron Ka Jaise Hawaon Mein
Aise Bhatakta Hoon Din Raat Dikhta Hoon Main Teri Raahon Mein
Mere Gunaho Mein Mere Sawabo Mein Shamil Tu
Bhooli Atthanni Si Bachpan Ke Kurte Mein Se Mil Tu

Rakhoon Chhupa Ke Main Sab Se Woh Laila
Maangoon Zamane Se Rab Se Woh Laila
Kab Se Main Tera Hoon Kab Se Tu Meri Laila 

Teri Talab Thi Haan Teri Talab Hai
Tu Hi Toh Sab Thi Haan Tu Hi Toh Sab Hai
Kab Se Main Tera Hoon Kab Se Tu Meri Laila

There is no explicit content, nudity, or sexual activity.

SXYBIT тАУ One For The Night (Official Music Video)
One For The Night is a soft and emotional music video that captures a special late-night moment, a quiet connection, and the feeling of being close to someone, even if just for a night.
This visual story is crafted with clean cinematic shots, soft lighting, and smooth transitions, creating a calm and immersive atmosphere that beautifully blends with the night-time mood of the music.

The video focuses on gentle emotions, meaningful moments, and subtle storytelling, making it suitable for all audiences and fully compliant with YouTubeтАЩs Community Guidelines and monetization policies.

тЬи Video Highlights:
 тАв Emotional & late-night storytelling

Song - Thodi Der

possible spoilers below this point

snippet.description:
Today I played Roblox Zombie Arena! Make sure you watch the whole video to find out what happens.

Merch: https://foltyn.shop/

Join this channel to get access to perks:
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCRkuUgtDAL4XSU5jB40J_wA/join

--Socials--

Discord: https://discord.gg/hqwZhrkqRr

Roblox Group: https://www.roblox.com/groups/11775558/Foltyns-Family#!/about

Roblox Name: TheRealFoltyn

Insta: https://www.instagram.com/realfoltyn/

Twitter: https://twitter.com/Foltynnn

What is Roblox? ROBLOX is an online virtual playground and workshop, where kids of all ages can safely interact, create, have fun, and learn. ItтАЩs unique in that practically everything on ROBLOX is designed and constructed by members of the community. ROBLOX is designed for 13 to 18 year olds, but it is open to people of all ages. Each player starts by choosing an avatar and giving it an identity. They can then explore ROBLOX тАФ interacting with others by chatting, playing games, or collaborating on creative projects. Each player is also given their own piece of undeveloped real estate along with a virtual toolbox with which to design and build anything тАФ be it a navigable skyscraper, a working helicopter, a giant pinball machine, a multiplayer тАЬCapture the FlagтАЭ game or some other, yet-to-be-dreamed-up creation. There is no cost for this first plot of virtual land. By participating and by building cool stuff, ROBLOX members can earn specialty badges as well as ROBLOX dollars (тАЬRobuxтАЭ). In turn, they can shop the online catalog to purchase avatar clothing and accessories as well as premium building materials, interactive components, and working mechanisms.

#Roblox #foltyn
